column1: # Suzume L2 Dictionary - Expressions (表現・感動詞・接続詞・代名詞)
# Contains: INTERJECTION, OTHER (greetings, fillers, casual expressions),
# Note: A few fillers (ふーん, えーと) are in L1 interjections
# Note: さすが is in L1 na_adjectives.h
# Note: Variable-length prolonged patterns (うわーーー) handled by emphatic pattern in tokenizer
# MeCab treats these as single tokens (格助詞,連語)
